How many days do I have to return something?

You have 90 days from the purchase date to return most unused, non-defective items for a full refund. Just make sure your item is unused and in its original packaging. Let me know if you have any other questions!

mplemodern.com/pages/returns-portal

A few quick notes:

Most unused, non-defective items can be returned within 90 days of purchase.
The return label cost will be deducted from your refund.
We don’t currently offer direct exchanges.
If you want a different item, you can return the original item and place a new order.

If your item is defective or broken, please use our claims portal instead: https://claims.simplemodern.com

Do I have to pay for return shipping?

Great question 😊

Usually, yes — for standard returns, the cost of the return label is deducted from your refund.

If there’s a special situation, like we sent the wrong item, the process may be different.

You can start a return here: https://www.simplemodern.com/pages/returns-portal

Let me know if there’s anything else I can help with!

How long until I get my refund once you receive it?

I don’t have an exact refund timeline listed once your return is received and processed.

In general, your refund is sent back to your original payment method after the return is processed, and how long it takes to show up can depend on your bank or card provider.

If you’ve already sent something back and want to check on a specific return, let me know if there’s anything else I can help with! 💕
